entries.title: A Fool's Head
entries.description: The severed head of a synthetic jester. Not in great condition but can still remember some jokes.

entries.title: Agoniser
entries.description: A barbaric relic. Silver needle that causes unbearable pain to organic creatures without leaving a mark.

entries.title: All-Purpose Idol
entries.description: Imbued with powerful neuro-active programming. Observers always believe the idol represents the deity they worship.

entries.title: Black Heart
entries.description: Repulsive twitching cyborg organ. Will slowly and painfully revive a single dead body.

entries.title: Blasphemies of the Binary Demon
entries.description: A tablet engraved with a series of quantum-logical propositions. Poses little threat to organic life but can be deadly to sentient machines.

entries.title: Chameleon Cloak
entries.description: Perfectly matches the colour of its surroundings.

entries.title: Desiccated Mycomorph
entries.description: Tiny dried out fungus-man. A drop of blood will revive him.

entries.title: Dried Crypt Lotus
entries.description: Grim flower that sprouts from the forehead of corpses. Sometimes kept as a keepsake of a lost companion.

entries.title: Flesh of the Honeyed Lamb
entries.description: Stolen from the Cult of the Honeyed Lamb; ancient meat imbued with a powerful medicinal psychedelic.

entries.title: Midas Bomb
entries.description: Transforms organic matter into gold.

entries.title: Mirror Ring
entries.description: Projects a hologram copy of the wearer that mimics their actions.

entries.title: Nightmare Box
entries.description: Small cube of unbreakable, dark-tinted glass. Has one small peephole. Those that look inside are paralysed by horror.

entries.title: Pale Blade of Amun-Oh
entries.description: Priests of Amun-Oh pledge never to take a life; their white knives will cut through anything except living flesh.

entries.title: Sandworm Horn
entries.description: Blow outdoors to summon a sandworm, if you are bold enough.

entries.title: Singing Crystal
entries.description: When struck, sings loudly and beautifully for up to an hour.

entries.title: Sky-seeking Salve
entries.description: Reverses effect of gravity on object it coats. Take care when outdoors.

entries.title: Ulfire Candle
entries.description: Ulfire is the ninth colour; its light has the unusual quality of shining through solid objects. It is blocked by lead.

entries.title: Unbearable Wax
entries.description: Black wax that increases in weight one hundred times as it dries. Single dose.

entries.title: Vial of ICE-9
entries.description: One dose of an alchemical substance that transforms all water it touches into un-meltable ice.

entries.title: Visualiser Helm
entries.description: Golden bubble-helmet that projects imagery of the wearer's thoughts, whether they want it to or not.
